name: Longest Palindromic Subsequence
description: Given a string s, find the length of the longest palindromic subsequence. A subsequence is a sequence that can be derived by deleting some or no elements without changing the order of the remaining elements.
constraints: 1 <= s.length <= 1000. s consists only of lowercase English letters.

performance.stress_intent: separate quadratic palindrome DP from exponential end-recursion using longer repeated and alternating strings
